title: Lorp's Vanilla Tweaks
description: Adds new crafts for vanilla items
body:
## What it does?:

Adds many new crafts:

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/840f08c7feb52981a878ac06848de0b3f8ac0d73.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad0790d66120c5c67611be791ae11ff186794c10.png)

## Future of the mod:

I plan to add some other crafts, like other easy crafts for redstone stuff. Something with barrels. I would'n add anything except crafts in this mod, so it could be vanilla server friendly. 

## My other projects:
 
1. https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-engineering-better-cloche

2. https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rependentsartifacts
